title: Book Demo
description: Choose a convenient slot and submit basic learner details for the first interaction.

title: Assessment
description: A short academic review helps identify strengths, gaps, and ideal focus areas.

title: Tutor Match
description: Students are matched with a tutor based on subject goals, level, and learning style.

title: Personalized Plan
description: A clear learning roadmap is set with targets, session cadence, and milestones.

title: Track Progress
description: Parents receive structured updates with measurable progress indicators over time.
